meta.title: Emmanuel ADJA AMANGOUA | Data & AI Portfolio
meta.description: Expert in data analysis and intelligent solutions.

intro.badge: Emmanuel Adja Amangoua — Master DS & AI
intro.text: Master's student in Data Science & AI, I develop decision support solutions via Machine Learning. Selected for Defense (CND) and Agriculture (SIA) Hackathons, I master complex engineering (SMOTE) and interactive interface deployment (Streamlit). My goal: transform raw data into a strategic innovation lever.

pillars.title: The 3 Pillars
pillars.description: Three application fields where data creates value.

items.title: Sport Analytics
items.description: Performance metrics, scouting, real‑time insights to improve decision‑making.

items.title: Automotive
items.description: Predictive maintenance, telematics, flow optimization and safety via embedded analytics.

items.title: Humanitarian (NGO)
items.description: Resource allocation, impact tracking, dashboards to steer field operations.

pitch.title: My Pitch
pitch.text: I transform raw data into a strategic innovation lever through mastery of complex engineering and MLOps deployment.

vision.note: Data Science is universal: it adapts to the challenges of Sports, Automotive and Humanitarian sectors to create real impact.

hero.name: Emmanuel ADJA AMANGOUA
hero.title: Master's Student in Data Science and AI
hero.subtitle: Seeking a 4–6 month internship from June 2026. I turn raw data into a strategic innovation lever.

about.headline: Master's Student in Data Science and AI
about.bio: Master's student in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, specialized in data analysis and machine learning, I design data-driven solutions for real-world problems in fields such as sports analytics, industrial innovation, and impact projects.
about.vision: Transform raw data into a strategic innovation lever.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Leveraging the power of Large Language Models (LLMs).

items.title: Data Scientist — Industrial Predictive Maintenance
items.summary: Engineering complex physical variables (thermal differential, power) to isolate weak failure signals. Imbalance management via SMOTE (3.4% failures).

items.title: AI Data Scientist — HINOSYS Hackathon (SIA 2026)
items.summary: LLM Architecture: Designing a financial Decision Support Tool (DST) to estimate the impact of livestock system changes.
highlights: Presentation on the 'La Ferme Digitale' stage

items.title: Data Engineer & ML — Defense Hackathon (CND)
items.summary: Proactive detection: Developing a real-time cyber incident classification system via Random Forest and XGBoost. Orchestrating massive and heterogeneous flows.

items.title: Data Scientist — Football Match Predictor
items.summary: Multi-source CSV ETL pipeline. Custom variable creation and correlation visualization.

items.title: Business Intelligence — SME Performance Analysis
items.summary: Designing Power BI dashboards to transform sales flows into actionable key performance indicators (KPIs).

items.title: Full-Stack Developer — DMS Platform (L3)
items.summary: Full information system architecture & modeling via UML (StarUML). Developing a secure web DMS application (PHP, SQL, HTML/CSS).

items.name: Supply Chain & Logistics Analytics
items.description: Interactive dashboard for global flow steering and delivery delay analysis.
items.impact: Identification of root causes for delays by region and customer segment.

items.name: Industrial Predictive Maintenance
items.description: Modeling industrial failures with SMOTE imbalance management and GridSearchCV optimization.
items.impact: Isolating weak failure signals with an AUC-ROC of 0.98.

items.name: AI Agriculture Hackathon (SIA 2026)
items.description: Financial Decision Support Tool via LLM to estimate the impact of livestock system changes.
items.impact: Financial optimization via generative AI and data storytelling.

items.name: Cyber Hackathon (Ministry of Defense 2025)
items.description: Real-time cyber incident classification via Random Forest and XGBoost on massive flows.
items.impact: Proactive threat detection and strategic recommendations.

items.name: Football Match Predictor
items.description: Multi-class classification model for Win/Draw/Loss with multi-source ETL pipeline.
items.impact: Robust predictions based on advanced statistics and correlations.

items.name: Business Intelligence SME
items.description: Interactive Power BI dashboards for commercial steering and actionable KPIs.
items.impact: Transformation of sales flows into strategic indicators.

items.name: DMS Platform
items.description: Document Management System (PHP, MySQL) with StarUML modeling.
items.impact: Secure architecture for corporate document management.
